description_long: This is a large, multi-manual pipe organ console with a dark wood finish and a prominent, wide pedalboard at the base. The console features three stacked rows of white and black keys, each row flanked by numerous round stop knobs arranged in vertical columns on both sides. Above the keyboards, there is a music stand and a set of control buttons or switches. The bench is long and matches the lighter color of the pedalboard, providing ample seating for the organist. The overall design is robust and angular, with the side panels extending outward to accommodate the stop controls and provide a commanding presence.
description: A grand, dark wood pipe organ console with three stacked keyboards, numerous stop knobs, a wide pedalboard, and a matching bench.
description_view_0: Front view showing three manual keyboards, two large panels of stop knobs, a wide pedalboard, and a matching bench.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the console, the layered keyboards, and the full length of the bench and pedalboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood back of the console and the back of the bench, with no visible controls or keys.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile of the stop knobs, keyboards, and the bench.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Three stacked manual keyboards, each with a standard arrangement of alternating white and black keys, flanked by vertical columns of round stop knobs.
